DA FONSECA; NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)

DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-26-2024 Sustained
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Atty. SANDRA HABIB. Esq. of Erskine Law Group, APC (Tel: 949-777-6032) for Defendant.
No other appearances made in this matter.

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT GENERAL MOTORS, LLC's DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT.

Matter not argued/contested. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

No opposition timely filed; demurrer sustained with leave to amend.

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported.(302/RBU)
